g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens when a file is uploaded to SmartKYC?')
sendPrompt('How does Gemini Vision document extraction work?')
sendPrompt('What does a successful Gemini Vision extraction return?')
sendPrompt('How does the MRZ parser work in SmartKYC?')
sendPrompt('What fields does the MRZ parser extract?')
sendPrompt('How does Tesseract OCR work as a fallback in SmartKYC?')
sendPrompt('Which regex parsers exist in document_service.py?')

svg.text: Each step merges into the result — first successful extraction wins, later steps fill missing fields.
